---
title: "Assignment 1a (R) - refactored obesity dataset code"
output: html_notebook
---

## Part 0 — setup

```{r setup}
# Install only the packages that are missing (no re-install)
required <- c("readr", "randomForest")
for (pkg in required) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(pkg, repos = "http://cran.us.r-project.org")
  }
}

library(readr)
library(randomForest)

# Load the project's reusable helper functions
source("R/data_preparation.R")
source("R/modelling.R")
source("R/plotting.R")
```

---

## Part 1 — Configuration

```{r config}
# Path to the local data file (kept in a data folder)
CSV_PATH <- file.path("data", "ObesityDataSet_raw_and_data_sinthetic.csv")

N_WEB_ROWS     <- 498L   # first N rows are the original records
TRAIN_FRACTION <- 0.7    # train/test split fraction
RANDOM_SEED    <- 42L    # for reproducibility

# Column groups, encoded by type
BINARY_YESNO_COLS <- c("family_history_with_overweight", "FAVC", "SMOKE", "SCC")
ORDINAL_FREQ_COLS <- c("CAEC", "CALC")
ACTIVE_TRANSPORT  <- c("Walking", "Bike")  # MTRANS values treated as "active"

FEATURE_COLS <- c(
  "Age", "Gender", "family_history_with_overweight", "FAVC", "FCVC", "NCP",
  "CAEC", "SMOKE", "CH2O", "SCC", "FAF", "TUE", "CALC", "MTRANS"
)
```

---

## Part 2 — Load data

```{r load-data}
df <- load_obesity_data(CSV_PATH)

# Split into the original "web" records and the "synthetic" remainder.
df_web       <- df[seq_len(N_WEB_ROWS), ]
df_synthetic <- df[(N_WEB_ROWS + 1):nrow(df), ]  # held out, unused downstream

head(df_web)  # quick check
```

---

## Part 3 — Target: BMI and weight categories

```{r target}
df_web <- add_bmi(df_web)

plot(df_web$BMI, type = "l", main = "BMI (web records)", ylab = "BMI")

df_web$label <- classify_bmi(df_web$BMI)  # vectorised classification

df_web[10:20, ]
```

---

## Part 4 — Feature encoding

```{r encode}
# Gender: Male -> 1, Female -> 0.
df_web$Gender <- as.integer(df_web$Gender == "Male")

# MTRANS: active transport (Walking, Bike) -> 1, otherwise 0.
df_web$MTRANS <- as.integer(df_web$MTRANS %in% ACTIVE_TRANSPORT)

# yes/no and ordinal columns handled by reusable functions.
df_web <- encode_yes_no(df_web, BINARY_YESNO_COLS)
df_web <- encode_ordinal_frequency(df_web, ORDINAL_FREQ_COLS)
```

---

## Part 5 — Class weights

```{r class-weights}
class_weights <- compute_class_weights(df_web$label)

print(sort(unique(df_web$label)))
print(class_weights)
```

---

## Part 6 — Train / test split

```{r split}
set.seed(RANDOM_SEED)  # reproducible split

indices   <- seq_len(nrow(df_web))
idx_train <- sample(indices, size = floor(TRAIN_FRACTION * length(indices)))
idx_test  <- setdiff(indices, idx_train)

X_train <- df_web[idx_train, FEATURE_COLS]
X_test  <- df_web[idx_test,  FEATURE_COLS]
y_train <- df_web$BMI[idx_train]
y_test  <- df_web$BMI[idx_test]

weights_train <- class_weights[df_web$label[idx_train]]
weights_test  <- class_weights[df_web$label[idx_test]]
```

---

## Part 7 — Model training

```{r train}
# Random forest regressor (config lives in train_bmi_model()).
# The original also fit an lm() here and then overwrote it -> removed.
reg <- train_bmi_model(X_train, y_train)
```

---

## Part 8 — Evaluation

```{r evaluate-plots}
preds_test  <- predict(reg, X_test)
preds_train <- predict(reg, X_train)

plot_pred_vs_actual(preds_test,  y_test,  main = "Test set: predicted vs. actual")
plot_pred_vs_actual(preds_train, y_train, main = "Train set: predicted vs. actual")
```

```{r evaluate-mae}
baseline_pred <- rep(mean(y_train), length(y_test))  # baseline = train mean

mae_baseline <- weighted_mae(y_test, baseline_pred, weights_test)
mae_model    <- weighted_mae(y_test, preds_test,    weights_test)

cat(sprintf("Weighted MAE (baseline): %.3f\n", mae_baseline))
cat(sprintf("Weighted MAE (model):    %.3f\n", mae_model))
```
